focus: Add official dataset references to public phase pages and Cranfield metadata.
reason_started: The operator noted that readers may not know Cranfield, BEIR, or ESCI and asked for dataset references.
reason_ended: Dataset references are visible on the deployed public pages, Cranfield metadata includes source URLs, local validation passes, and public verification passed.

validators_executed.name: npm run validate
validators_executed.evidence: 21 tests passed, including dataset reference route assertions and metadata source URL assertion.

validators_executed.name: public reference verification
validators_executed.evidence: Live checks passed for home references, Phase 1 source references, BEIR and ESCI planned pages, metadata source URL, and search API stability.

github_submission.blocker: The operator asked for a project-local public content update, not a commit or push.

reusable_lessons: Public benchmark demos should link unfamiliar dataset names to official source material and mark future datasets as not selected instead of implying availability.
downstream_impacts: Future BEIR, ESCI, and behavioral phases should keep source links and dataset provenance visible before claiming results.
content_seeds: Phase 1 article can introduce Cranfield by linking to the Glasgow collection source and explain why later phases move to BEIR and ESCI.
evidence_quality_notes: References use official project or dataset source pages, not generic summaries.
Behavioral ranking explicitly remains source-not-selected to avoid unsupported dataset claims.

supports_mission: Makes the public demo more educational for readers unfamiliar with IR benchmarks.
Improves dataset provenance without changing the retrieval architecture.
Keeps future phases honest about source status.
missing: Phase 1 article linked to the organized route set.
goal_drift_review.mission_alignment: GEN-009 improves public transparency and educational value while preserving the validated Phase 1 baseline.
